title: SyncResponse
description: The response from a content sync operation, containing the synced items and tokens for subsequent sync requests.

items.description: Array of sync item objects representing content changes.

paginationToken.description: Token to retrieve the next page of sync results. Present only when more pages are available.

syncToken.description: Token representing the current sync state. Use this in subsequent sync requests to receive only new changes.

total_count.description: Total number of items in the sync response.

skip.description: Number of items skipped in this response.
